sections.paragraph:
Original: נמוּאל

Transliteration: nemû'êl

Phonetic: nem-oo-ale'

BDB Definition:

Nemuel = "day of God"
  1. the eldest son of Simeon
  2. a Reubenite, son of Eliab and brother of Dathan and Abiram in the time of the exodus

Origin: apparently for H3223

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
